name: Nginx Redirect
tagline: This is a very simply redirect nginx image. It redirects all HTTP requests to the HTTP address that you define. It's useful when you want to redirect all traf
description:
This is a very simply redirect nginx image. It redirects all HTTP requests to the HTTP address that you define. It's useful when you want to redirect all traf


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  nginx-redirect:
    image: caprover/nginx-redirect:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      RETURN_LOCATION: return 301 https://caprover.com$request_uri;
    ports:
      - 42079:80
